word: G2618 - κατακαίω - katakaíō - kat-ak-ah'-ee-o - Burn up

sections.paragraph:
- Original: κατακαίω

- Transliteration: Katakaio

- Phonetic: kat-ak-ah'-ee-o

- Definition:

1. to burn up, consume by fire

- Origin: from G2596 and G2545

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G2596 and G2545; to burn down (to the ground) that is consume wholly: - burn (up utterly).
